title: Figure 4 from: He M-H, Luo X-Y, Habib K, Lu P-Z, Jin Y-L, Ashraf U, Li Q-R (2026) Multigene phylogenetic analyses and morpho-anatomical characterization revealed two new species of Xylariomycetidae from Yunnan, China. MycoKeys 127: 289-306. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.127.179422
author: He, Ming-Hui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 4 Pallidoperidium yunnanense (GMB6414, holotype). A. Dead corticated host culm with immersed ascomata; B. Surface view of ascomata; C. Cross section of ascoma; D, F. Vertical section of ascoma; E. Peridium; G. Inamyloid ascal apical apparatus (stained in Melzer's reagent); H. Paraphyses; I–L. Ascospores; M–O. Asci. Scale bars: 0.5 mm (B–D); 100 μm (F); 10 μm (E, G–O)
